'''LEGO City''' was a gated [[City/Legends|city]] in the [[Universe/Legends|Known Universe]]. Despite not being located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the conflict of the [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]] was felt there through a [[Disturbance in the Force/Legends|Disturbance in the Force]]. Six [[Human/Legends|Humans]] lived in LEGO City, as well as three [[GNK power droid/Legends|GNK power droids]] and various [[Plant/Legends|plants]] and [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Additionally, several houses and vehicles were located in LEGO City.<ref name="TCS" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|In an infinite universe, all things are possible. As the second Death Star explodes beside an Endor moon, Anakin Skywalker's epic journey is complete. With his final sacrifice, balance has returned to the force. In ANOTHER galaxy far, far away, though, echos of this drama live on, and a new world awakens....|The opening crawl for LEGO City in ''LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy''|<ref name="II">''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]''</ref>}}
LEGO City first appeared in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]''. It is a bonus level that could be unlocked after collecting 60 gold bricks. The goal of the level is for the player to collect one million studs located in the city.<ref name="II" /> In the game's [[2007]] re-release in ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'', playing LEGO City only requires 10 gold bricks, and it has a different [[opening crawl]], one that is shared with the similar [[New Town (LEGO)|New Town]] bonus level.<ref name="TCS" />
